decisions.title: Why Composability Matters
decisions.description: The full reference agent is built by composing all previous lessons' mechanisms together. No single lesson's code was written with knowledge of the final system — each piece was designed to be independent and composable. This proves that the architecture is not a monolith designed top-down, but a set of building blocks that snap together. A real-world agent can use any subset of these mechanisms based on its requirements.
decisions.alternatives: A top-down design would produce a more optimized system by eliminating redundancies between layers. However, it would be harder to learn from (you must understand the whole to understand any part) and harder to customize (removing one feature might break others). Composability sacrifices some efficiency for massive gains in flexibility and learnability.

zh.title: 为什么可组合性很重要
zh.description: 完整的参考 Agent 通过组合前面所有课程的机制构建而成。没有任何一课的代码是在知道最终系统全貌的情况下编写的——每个部件都被设计为独立且可组合的。这证明了该架构不是自上而下设计的单体，而是一组可以拼接在一起的构建块。现实中的 Agent 可以根据需求使用这些机制的任意子集。

decisions.title: Why Each Mechanism Is Orthogonal
decisions.description: Tools, subagents, skills, compaction, tasks, background execution, teams, protocols, autonomy, and worktrees are all orthogonal mechanisms. Enabling or disabling one does not require changes to any other. This orthogonality is not accidental — it is the central design principle. It means you can build an agent with tools and compaction but without teams, or with teams and worktrees but without skills. Every combination works.
decisions.alternatives: Tightly integrated mechanisms can be more powerful — for example, a task system that automatically spawns worktrees and assigns team members. However, tight integration means you cannot use one without the others. By keeping mechanisms orthogonal, we maximize the number of valid configurations and minimize the learning curve for each individual piece.

zh.title: 为什么每个机制都是正交的
zh.description: 工具、子 Agent、技能、压缩、任务、后台执行、团队、协议、自治和工作目录都是正交的机制。启用或禁用其中一个不需要修改其他任何部分。这种正交性不是偶然的——它是核心设计原则。这意味着你可以构建一个有工具和压缩但没有团队的 Agent，也可以构建有团队和工作目录但没有技能的 Agent。每种组合都能正常工作。
